ai_summary: **Executive Summary: HFCL Q1FY27 Earnings**  HFCL reported an exceptionally strong Q1FY27, reversing a prior-year loss to achieve significant profitability with remarkable 119.85% revenue growth and expanded EBITDA and PAT margins of 23.25% and 12.83% respectively. This material improvement is driven by a strategic pivot to high-margin products, increased exports, and a rapidly growing Defence & Aerospace segment, supported by a robust Rs 26,000+ crore order book. The company has raised its FY27 revenue growth aspiration to 40%, reflecting a confident outlook with no apparent red flags.
